name: Cyberpunk Heist Web
description: Preset Cyberpunk Heist Web with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: One impossible theft exposes a web of corporate blackmail.
text_areas.setting: Megacity sectors ruled by syndicates and omnipresent surveillance.
text_areas.main_objective: Steal key data while navigating shifting betrayals.
text_areas.stakes: Captured data triggers lethal cleanup and social collapse.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
